title: Manufacturing Engineer - Asian Paints Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Asian Paints Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Asian Paints Digital Technologies in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Asian Paints Digital Technologies:
Asian Paints Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Digital Technologies!
